item.title: The 2026-2027 Season of Events - 05/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 09/08/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Here it is, folks! There are still a couple of [...]
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The 2026-2027 Season of Events on May 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include season of events and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Heidelberg Youth Football Camp - 07/07/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/09/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 138 Greenfield St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

The Heidelberg Football Youth Camp is designed to serve campers ages 6 to 13 in all areas of football development. The purpose of our youth camp is to teach the fundamentals of football to the youth of Tiffin and the surrounding area. The non-contact instruction by our expert staff is designed to help improve the skill level and football IQ of our campers. The camp will instruct each day on offense, defense, special teams, age appropriate strength and conditioning instruction, and flexibility and speed improvement. We will instruct on academic success and the importance it will have for the camper as he approaches high school and beyond. The coaching staff and players from Heidelberg will work directly with campers to ensure a safe, exciting, and fun-filled experience for all attendees.

Whether you are an experienced player, or a first time participant, our camp will improve your skill and give you a better understanding of the fundamentals, concepts, execution, and team work necessary to form a championship player and team. Each camper will receive a detailed evaluation, a camp t-shirt, and a camp certificate of completion. We look forward to working with your child in a family-friendly, positive, fun-filled environment.

Our camp will run from Tuesday, July 7 to Thursday, July 9. The camp will begin at 9:00 AM and conclude at noon daily. Please arrive early on the first day to help with registration. Our staff will be on hand on Tuesday, beginning at 8:00 AM for registration, and will be available for the monitoring of campers at 8:30 for the remainder of camp. Registration, drop-off, and pick up each day will be at Riesen Field, at Hoernemann Stadium located on Heidelberg’s campus.
item.dc:creator: Heidelberg University Football
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Heidelberg Youth Football Camp on Jul 7, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include football and heidelberg.

item.title: Summer Hydraulics - 07/09/2026 8:00am UTC to 07/09/2026 4:30pm UTC
item.description: Location : 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Length: 24 Hours $2000 per person Course Description: This course is a basic study of the principles of fluid power systems based on industrial applications with hydraulics. A heavy focus is on hydraulic systems, components, assembling circuits and demonstrating the circuits operate correctly. The student will learn how to interpret a hydraulic circuit print and predict the operation of a circuit based on the print. The student will also assemble and troubleshoot the circuits in a controlled lab environment with industrial grade devices. Students will also utilize the simulation software, Automation Studio, to simulate hydraulic circuits in an asynchronous format. The student will also be focusing on safety when working w
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Learning Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Summer Hydraulics on Jul 9, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include industrial and seasonal.

item.title: "Aspen Trees" Thursday, July 9, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #07092601 or #07092602 - 07/09/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/09/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Pre-registration and payment is required by Friday, July 3. Paint "Aspen Trees" in water mixable oils with Carol Hoffman on Thursday, July 9 from 9am until 12 pm or from 6pm-9pm. Please arrive at least 15 minutes before class time. Carol will guide you through the process of creating this painting whether you are a beginner or more advanced painter. All of the materials including the 11"x14" canvas are included in the price of the class. Minimum class size 3 people, maximum of 8. Please bring a large box to take your painting home in. Cost is $50 for TAG members & $60 for non-members. Call Carol with questions. 419 624 7020, Tiffin Art Guild at 419-443-0478 (tiffinartguild@att.net), or stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Aspen Trees" Thursday, July 9, 2026 9am-12pm or 6pm-9pm #07092601 or #07092602 on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include advanced painter and aspen trees.

item.title: Toledo Zoo - 07/09/2026 10:30am EDT to 07/09/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Elementary Programs are designed for children going into Kindergarten through 5th Grade.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Toledo Zoo on Jul 9, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include School and 5th grade.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/09/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/09/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and summer activities.

item.title: Discovery Series—Candle Making - 07/09/2026 2:00pm EDT to 07/09/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA For youth ages 12 to 17 years and older.  Join Linda Rose as we create our own dip candles over the open fire. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Discovery Series—Candle Making on Jul 9, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include linda rose and open fire.

item.title: 2p | Mega Messy Day - 07/09/2026 2:00pm EDT to 07/09/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library on Thursday, July 9, for a day of creativity during "Mega Messy Day"! From 2:00 to 4:00 p.m., preschool through second-grade children can engage in hands-on activities like painting and sensory play in the Frost Kalnow Room. Kids are encouraged to dress for messiness and fun as they explore their imaginations. Simultaneously, teens in grades 6 through 12 can participate in the Teen Art Club from 2:00 to 3:30 p.m. in the Junior Home Room, bringing their own projects or trying new crafts with supplied materials. Both events are part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ or call 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2p | Mega Messy Day on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and summer reading program.

item.title: Night Market - 07/09/2026 5:00pm EDT to 07/09/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 205 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come shop with the local vendors and listen to live music at the Amphitheater
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Night Market on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include farmers market and live music.

item.title: Family Movie Night - 07/09/2026 5:30pm EDT to 07/09/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Join us for Family Movie Night! Bring your dinner, favorite blanket or camp chair & get comfy! Folding chair seating and popcorn provided! Call the library at 419-426-3825 to find out what is playing.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Family Movie Night on Jul 9, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include popcorn and public library.

item.title: Taste of Lebanon - 07/09/2026 6:30pm EDT to 07/09/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Enjoy the Flavors of Lebanon
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Taste of Lebanon on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and flavors of lebanon.

item.title: Downtown Trivia Night at The Knights of Columbus - America 250!! - 07/09/2026 7:00pm EDT to 07/09/2026 8:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 49 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Bring your American History knowledge and dress is Red, White & Blue! We are celebrating America 250!! Groups of all ages are invited to compete in two rounds of general trivia questions plus the final questions of local interest. Answers will be judged by local celebrities. Participants are asked to form teams of 6 or fewer, which can be composed of all ages. Teams will write their answers to be judged by local celebrities. Questions will be geared toward ages 12 and up. No phones, tablets, or electronic devices may be accessed during the contest. A traveling trophy will be awarded to the winning team. **ONE GrowthZone ticket per team. List each of the team members on the ticket.
item.dc:creator: Downtown Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Downtown Trivia Night at The Knights of Columbus - America 250!! on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and trivia night.

item.title: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) - 07/09/2026 7:00pm EDT to 07/09/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA This is our concert series, free to the public. Come out and have your ears blessed, and put a smile on that face on Thursdays! Can't wait to see you!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Park & Recreation
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) on Jul 9, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin park recreation and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: ServSafe Manager Class - 07/10/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/17/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The ServSafe Manager course will be offered on July 10th and 17th. This class will consist of an instructor-led class with a 9th edition ServSafe manager textbook and online exam voucher included.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: ServSafe Manager Class on Jul 10, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include 9th edition textbook and online exam voucher.

item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Serving up iconic stories and themed lunch! Registration Required. Sign up at the library or by calling 419-426-3825.

item.description: Location : 47 Clay St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.

Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Steinmetz Signs & Graphic Ink (SSG Ink - Shortened)
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 10, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and summer fun.

item.title: Preschool Pals—Fishing Fun - 07/10/2026 2:00pm EDT to 07/10/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA For ages 3 to 5 years.  Join Linda Rose as we try to catch some fish in the pond.  Fishing poles and bait provided or bring your own. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Preschool Pals—Fishing Fun on Jul 10, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include preschool pals—fishing fun and Kids & Family.

item.title: Corner T Fun - 07/10/2026 4:00pm EDT to 07/10/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Perry St, New Riegel, OH 44853, USA null
item.dc:creator: New Riegel Cafe
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Corner T Fun on Jul 10, 2026 in New Riegel, OH. This is a recurring event with themes including riegel and Food & Drink.

item.title: Ben & David Hohenstein Live Music - 07/10/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/10/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 6029 OH-101, Clyde, OH 43410, USA Friday Food Truck & Live Music at Sleepy Holllw RV Park. Archie’s Pizza will be here serving dinner starting at 4 & the Hohenstein twins with live music at 6!
item.dc:creator: Archie’s Pizza Truck
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Ben & David Hohenstein Live Music on Jul 10, 2026 in Clyde, OH. Featured themes include food truck and live music.

item.title: Nature Walk Bird Talk - 07/11/2026 8:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA Spend the morning looking and listening to the sights and sounds of nature in the preserve as you walk the trails with Linda Rose.  Binoculars helpful.  This walk qualifies for the Walking Stick Program and lasts about 1 ¼ hour.  Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Nature Walk Bird Talk on Jul 11, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include nature walk bird talk and Outdoors.

item.title: Simply Susan’s Strawberry Saturdays! - 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Chocolate covered strawberry cups are returning! $5 each until sold old! Come see us every Saturday during the farmers market! 70 s Washington. St Tiffin Ohio 44883
item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Simply Susan’s Strawberry Saturdays! on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include affordable treats and chocolate covered strawberry cups.

item.title: BREAKFAST & PIEROGI @ JAM’s Markets Saturdays 9a-1p - 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at JAM’s Markets every Saturday from 9 AM to 2 PM for a delightful breakfast experience! Stop by 145 Madison St, Tiffin, Ohio, and enjoy a variety of freshly made breakfast and lunch items, including delicious pierogi and artisanal sourdough breads. Our offerings are available while supplies last, so come early to savor these buzzworthy bites!
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: BREAKFAST & PIEROGI @ JAM’s Markets Saturdays 9a-1p on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include artisan sourdough and breakfast.

item.title: Farmers Market - 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 195 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Discover the joy of fresh produce, delightful baked goods, and stunning flowers, all waiting for you every Saturday morning!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Farmers Market on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include fresh produce and sustainability.

item.title: Farmers Market - 07/11/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 195 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Discover the joy of fresh produce, delightful baked goods, and stunning flowers, all waiting for you every Saturday morning!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Farmers Market on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include sustainability and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Breakfast & Bling w/ Linked by Savannah - 07/11/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 105 E Tiffin St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us on Saturday, July 11 during the Fostoria Farmers Market for a special morning at The UrbanWoody Brewery! Linked by Savannah will be on-site offering her beautiful permanent jewelry, making it the perfect time to treat yourself or create a lasting memory with a friend. We’ll also be serving up breakfast specials from the Brewtis Kitchen along with morning drink specials to help you kick off your Farmers Market adventure. Shop local, enjoy great food and drinks, and get linked while you’re downtown. We can’t wait to see you there!
item.dc:creator: The UrbanWoody Brewery & The HoneyBee Winery
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Breakfast & Bling w/ Linked by Savannah on Jul 11, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include local shopping and permanent jewelry.

item.title: Clyde Farmer's Market - 07/11/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 126 Railroad St, Clyde, OH 43410, USA We will be a vendor at the Clyde Farmer's Market on the second Saturday of the Month through October.
item.dc:creator: Homestead 6:33
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Clyde Farmer's Market on Jul 11, 2026 in Clyde, OH. Featured themes include local produce and second saturday.

item.title: Freshly Baked at The Farmhouse - 07/11/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 11351 E Township Rd 44, Attica, OH 44807, USA Join us for a gathering of our best bakers around!! Grab some samples or take some home!
item.dc:creator: The Farmhouse Collection LLC
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Freshly Baked at The Farmhouse on Jul 11, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include best bakers and chatfield, ohio.

item.title: Family Fun Event—Insect Safari - 07/11/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA Join Linda Rose from 11AM to 2PM in the grasslands and trails as we look for insects along the ways.  Learn what makes an insect and insect and more.    Nets provided or bring your own. Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Family Fun Event—Insect Safari on Jul 11, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include Outdoors and children.

item.title: 2026 Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing - 07/11/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 112 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tickets are on sale NOW for the Second Annual Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing The Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing is BACK — and bigger than ever!! Join us on Saturday, July 11, 2026 from 11 AM – 4 PM for a one-of-a-kind, Happy Gilmore-themed mini golf experience right through the heart of Downtown Tiffin, Ohio. Putt your way through 18 holes hosted by participating local businesses, explore everything downtown has to offer, and compete for trophies, gift baskets, gift cards, door prizes, and bragging rights — all in one unforgettable summer day. Tickets are $20 per golfer and going fast. Order online here: https://ssgink.com/shop/ols/products/2026-summer-downtown-mini-golf-outing-tickets Or purchase in person at SSG Ink or Simply Susan’s while supplies last. Online orders will be pulled the next business day, and you’ll be notified by text with pickup hours once your tickets are ready. Grab your friends, family, coworkers, or golf crew and come spend one happy day downtown. 18 holes. 18 businesses. 1 happy day.
item.dc:creator: Bailiwicks Coffee Company
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 2026 Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and sports.

item.title: 2026 Downtown Tiffin Mini Golf Outing - 07/11/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/11/2026 4:00pm EDT

Grab your friends, family, coworkers, or golf crew and come spend one happy day downtown. 18 holes. 18 businesses. 1 happy day.
